svg.title: Docker Architecture Overview
svg.desc: Full Docker architecture showing the Docker Client, Docker Host with daemon, and Docker Registry, plus key components like images, containers, volumes, and networks.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is a Docker base image?')
sendPrompt('What are image layers in Docker?')
sendPrompt('What is a running Docker container?')
sendPrompt('What are container processes in Docker?')
sendPrompt('What is a private Docker registry?')
